description: GBFS bikeshare source catalog for the gbfs-bikeshare feeder. Each entry is a GBFS auto-discovery endpoint. Choose which entries run with the GBFS_SOURCES environment variable: a comma-separated list of names, or '*' for all; when unset, every entry whose 'enabled' flag is true is polled. Point GBFS_SOURCES_FILE at a copy of this file to maintain your own catalog. Secrets may be written as ${ENV_VAR} and are expanded from the environment at load time, so keys never live in this file. The legacy GBFS_FEEDS / GBFS_SYSTEM_IDS / GBFS_API_KEY / GBFS_API_KEY_PARAM inline configuration still works and takes precedence over this catalog when GBFS_FEEDS is set.

sources.name: citibike-nyc
sources.description: Citi Bike (New York City, US) public GBFS v2.3 auto-discovery feed operated by Lyft.

sources.name: divvy-chicago
sources.description: Divvy (Chicago, US) public GBFS v2.3 auto-discovery feed operated by Lyft.

sources.name: bay-wheels-sf
sources.description: Bay Wheels (San Francisco Bay Area, US) public GBFS v2.3 auto-discovery feed operated by Lyft.

sources.name: capital-bikeshare-dc
sources.description: Capital Bikeshare (Washington, DC, US) public GBFS v2.3 auto-discovery feed.

sources.name: bluebikes-boston
sources.description: Bluebikes (Boston metro, US) public GBFS auto-discovery feed.

sources.name: bike-share-toronto
sources.description: Bike Share Toronto (Toronto, Canada) public GBFS v3.0 auto-discovery feed.

sources.name: barcelona-bicing
sources.description: Bicing (Barcelona, Spain) public GBFS 3.0 feed on the PBSC/publicbikesystem platform; ~540 docking stations with mechanical and electric bikes. No key required. Add 'barcelona-bicing' to GBFS_SOURCES to enable.

sources.name: dublin-bikes
sources.description: Dublinbikes (Dublin, Ireland) public GBFS feed operated by JCDecaux on the Cyclocity platform; docked city-bike system. No key required. Add 'dublin-bikes' to GBFS_SOURCES to enable.

sources.name: ecobici-cdmx
sources.description: ECOBICI (Mexico City, Mexico) public GBFS feed operated by Lyft; large docked system with several hundred stations. No key required. Add 'ecobici-cdmx' to GBFS_SOURCES to enable.

sources.name: oslo-bysykkel
sources.description: Oslo Bysykkel (Oslo, Norway) public GBFS feed operated by Urban Sharing; docked city-bike system. No key required. Add 'oslo-bysykkel' to GBFS_SOURCES to enable.

sources.name: montreal-bixi
sources.description: BIXI (Montreal, Canada) public GBFS feed; ~900 docking stations with mechanical and electric bikes. No key required. Add 'montreal-bixi' to GBFS_SOURCES to enable.

sources.name: velib-paris
sources.description: Velib' Metropole (Paris, France) public GBFS feed operated by Smovengo; ~1400 docking stations with mechanical and electric bikes. No key required. Add 'velib-paris' to GBFS_SOURCES to enable.

sources.name: careem-dubai
sources.description: Careem BIKE (Dubai, United Arab Emirates) public GBFS 3.0 feed on the PBSC/publicbikesystem platform; docked bike-share. No key required. Add 'careem-dubai' to GBFS_SOURCES to enable.

sources.name: dott-paris
sources.description: Dott free-floating e-scooters and e-bikes (Paris, France) public GBFS feed; vehicle-level availability via free_bike_status. No key required. Add 'dott-paris' to GBFS_SOURCES to enable. The same host serves other Dott cities at /public/v2/{city}/gbfs.json.

sources.name: lime-paris
sources.description: Lime free-floating e-scooters and e-bikes (Paris, France) public partner GBFS feed; vehicle-level availability via free_bike_status. No key required. Add 'lime-paris' to GBFS_SOURCES to enable. The same host serves other Lime cities at /api/partners/v2/gbfs/{city}/gbfs.json.

sources.name: bolt-brussels
sources.description: Bolt free-floating e-scooters (Brussels, Belgium) public GBFS feed (system id 336); vehicle-level availability via free_bike_status. No key required. Add 'bolt-brussels' to GBFS_SOURCES to enable.

sources.name: voi-oslo-entur
sources.description: Voi free-floating e-scooters (Oslo, Norway) public GBFS 3.0 feed served via Entur, Norway's national mobility aggregator; vehicle-level availability via vehicle_status. No key required. Add 'voi-oslo-entur' to GBFS_SOURCES to enable. Entur publishes many other Norwegian micromobility operators at /mobility/v2/gbfs/v3/{operator}/gbfs.

sources.name: nextbike-template
sources.description: TEMPLATE for nextbike, a pan-European docked/hybrid operator running 300+ separate city systems on one GBFS host. Replace the SYSTEM_ID path segment with a specific nextbike system id (the MobilityData systems catalog lists each city's nextbike system id and gbfs.json URL), set a descriptive system_id, and set enabled to true. No key required.

sources.name: api-key-template-query-param
sources.description: TEMPLATE - copy this entry, replace autodiscovery_url with an operator GBFS gbfs.json endpoint, export SOME_GBFS_KEY in the runtime environment, set api_key_param to the operator's documented query parameter, and set enabled to true.

sources.name: api-key-template-url-template
sources.description: TEMPLATE - copy this entry for a second key-protected operator, replace autodiscovery_url, export OTHER_GBFS_KEY, set api_key_param to the documented query parameter, and set enabled to true.
